1792100.name: Motel Simulator
1792100.description:
Motel Simulator is going to be our next game that expands on the area created in Gas Station Simulator and Road Diner Simulator by adding a mid-sized motel. Well, a mid-sized something that used to be a motel at some point along Route 66.

You have to fix it first, expand, furnish and customize and do so step by step or rather room by room before the big money comes in. Motel Simulator will be closely tied to the gas station and also the diner, so any progress you do over there will directly influence, among other things, the amount and type of customers that will visit your motel.

Yes, the motel will be situated close to the diner and the gas station and these games will all be tightly connected with each other and influence each of the games and the events in them in new and exciting ways if you have them all.


Area by area, room by room, you will have to fix the place up. But it’s not just about renovating the place. You have to design it while at it and decide about the purpose of an area or even the rooms.
There will be a lot of choices that go beyond the typical recreational or serving areas. Even when it comes to rooms there are strategic choices to be made. Will you stick with small rooms or create some larger suits? Or maybe rooms especially designed for families?



A staggering amount of choices when it comes to furniture, wall and floor styles, deco and equipment will allow you design each room differently, if you choose to do so. For the entire building you can go with a wide range of styles and themes or mix and match. You can create a shady road motel or a rather luxurious resort or anything in between.
The choices you’ll make will determine the type of guests and your income, but also the amount and type of additional work or even trouble they bring with them.

Similar rules apply to all the expansions you will be able to create as you progress and services you will add to make your motel more appealing to certain types of travellers or to increase your income.


Who you rent rooms to and what may result from that down the road will be a major part of the gameplay. Motel Simulator will come with an entire new customer system that will greatly expand on what you see at the gas station and will encounter in the diner.

The guests will not be generic. There will be planty of fleshed out and colourful characters with their own quests and stories. Things will be happening in your motel you might be hard pressed to believe and can lead to quite unexpected situations you will have to deal with.

If you think you’ll be able to just sit there and hand out keys with boredom being your biggest challange, think again. You know us, we will keep you on your toes in ways you can’t imagine ;-)
1792100.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
